channel.title: Daily News Digest
channel.description: Curated daily news, filtered by Claude

item.title: [BBC] Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before deadline
item.description:
The US president wants Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy route, before his Tuesday deadline.

Major geopolitical escalation: US president issuing military ultimatum to Iran over critical global energy chokepoint with imminent deadline.

item.title: [BBC] Emergency jabs after 100 children die of suspected measles in a month in Bangladesh
item.description:
More than 100 people, mostly children, have been killed by measles since mid-March, officials suspect.

Large-scale public health crisis: 100+ deaths from measles outbreak in Bangladesh warrants awareness.

item.title: [Guardian] People of Burkina Faso should forget about democracy, says military ruler
item.description:
Ibrahim Traoré, who took power in 2022 coup, tells state broadcaster ‘we must tell the truth, democracy isn’t for us’People in Burkina Faso should forget about democracy as it is “not for us”, the military president, Ibrahim Traoré, told the country’s state broadcaster.Traoré took power in a coup in

Major regime shift: Military ruler renounces democracy as system for his country, representing significant authoritarian consolidation.

item.title: [Guardian] Uganda receives first US deportation flight under third-country agreement
item.description:
Dozen people arrive under new deal but legal challenges expected with scheme criticised as ‘dehumanising process’A flight carrying people being deported from the US has landed in Uganda, as Donald Trump’s administration pushes on with its strategy of expelling migrants to countries they have no ties

Major policy shift: Trump administration's third-country deportation agreement begins execution with first deportation flight.

item.title: [Guardian] A day in the life of Asia’s fuel crisis
item.description:
From farms in New Zealand to factories in Delhi, the effects of the oil crisis triggered by the Iran war are rippling across Asia Continue reading...

Major economic policy impact: Iran war triggering global oil crisis with ripple effects across Asia and beyond.

item.title: [Guardian] Middle East crisis live: Trump says he is ‘not at all’ worried about possible war crimes as his deadline nears
item.description:
US demands Iran reopen the strait of Hormuz while Tehran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal and insists it wants permanent end to conflictTalks to end Iran war appear to falter a day before Trump deadlineThe King Fahd Causeway, a key bridge linking Saudi Arabia to the island kingdom of Bahrain, close

Major geopolitical escalation: Iran war appears to be intensifying with US threats and failed ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: [Guardian] Talks to end Iran war appear to falter a day before Trump deadline
item.description:
US president acknowledges ‘significant’ 10-point peace plan submitted by Tehran but says it is ‘not good enough’Middle East crisis – live updatesDiplomatic negotiations aimed at halting the war in the Middle East appeared to be faltering a day before a deadline imposed by Donald Trump with a threat

Critical diplomatic development: Iran-US ceasefire talks failing could determine trajectory of major Middle East war.

item.title: [AlJazeera] Artemis II astronauts break record for farthest human travel from Earth
item.description:
Four astronauts from NASA’s Artemis II mission have broken the record for the farthest human travel from Earth.

Space milestone: Artemis II astronauts break record for farthest human travel from Earth.

item.title: [AlJazeera] Why is Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant being attacked?
item.description:
The WHO has warned of 'catastrophic' risks if radioactive release occurs.

Major escalation risk: Attacks on Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant threaten catastrophic radioactive release per WHO.

item.title: [AlJazeera] Lebanon’s Hezbollah and Yemen’s Houthis join Iran in strike on Israel
item.description:
The Houthis in Yemen say they attacked Israel alongside their backers Iran and Hezbollah in Lebanon.

War escalation: Houthis and Hezbollah formally join Iran's strikes on Israel, broadening regional conflict.

item.title: [AlJazeera] How Asia became ground zero for the oil crisis
item.description:
As the Iran war disrupts oil flows, fuel shortages hit Asia first. Is this the start of a wider global energy crisis?

Major economic/geopolitical story: Iran war disrupting global oil flows and creating energy crisis is a significant world event with broad implications.

item.title: [Verge] Artemis II astronauts break a record, name a crater
item.description:
A few minutes before 2PM ET on Monday, the crew of Artemis II broke a record set 56 years ago by the ill-fated Apollo 13 mission - at over 248,655 miles, they have now traveled farther from Earth than any humans before them. They marked the occasion with a crater naming ceremony that left the […]

Space milestone: Artemis II crew breaks 56-year-old distance record, a notable achievement in lunar exploration.

item.title: [Verge] Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi
item.description:
Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned Abu Dhabi data center if the US follows through on threats to attack the country's power plants, as reported earlier by Tom's Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news ou

Geopolitical escalation: Iran directly threatens US infrastructure (OpenAI data center) in response to potential US strikes.
